info.title: Solid Imager API
info.description: API documentation for the Solid Imager application.

get.description: Fetches details of a category by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the category to retrieve.

put.description: Updates an existing category with the provided data.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the category to update.

delete.description: Deletes a category by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the category to delete.

get.description: Fetches a list of all configured categories.

post.description: Creates a new category with the provided data.

get.description: Fetches details of a character by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the character to retrieve.

patch.description: Updates an existing character with the provided data.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the character to update.

delete.description: Deletes a character by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the character to delete.

get.description: Fetches a list of all configured characters.

post.description: Creates a new character with the provided data.

get.description: Fetches the current application configuration.

put.description: Updates the application configuration with the provided data.

post.description: Resets the application configuration to default values.
Fetches content from a specified URL. Useful for proxying requests or retrieving external resources.

url.description: The URL to fetch content from.

500.description: Failed to fetch URL or internal server error.

get.description: Fetches details of an Intellectual Property by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the IP to retrieve.

patch.description: Updates an existing Intellectual Property with the provided data.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the IP to update.

delete.description: Deletes an Intellectual Property by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the IP to delete.

get.description: Fetches a list of all configured Intellectual Properties.

post.description: Creates a new Intellectual Property with the provided data.

get.description: Fetches details of a Project by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the Project to retrieve.

patch.description: Updates an existing Project with the provided data.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the Project to update.

delete.description: Deletes a Project by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the Project to delete.

get.summary: Retrieve characters associated with a media
get.description: Fetches a list of characters linked to a specific media file.

200.description: A list of characters associated with the media.

400.description: Invalid source ID or media ID supplied.

post.summary: Add a character to a media
post.description: Associates a character with a specific media file.

delete.summary: Remove a character from a media
delete.description: Removes the association between a character and a specific media file.

get.description: Fetches detailed information for a specific media file, including tags, metadata, category, IP, and character information.

400.description: Invalid source ID or media ID supplied.

get.description: Fetches a specific media file by its source ID and media ID.

400.description: Invalid source ID or media ID supplied.

put.description: Updates metadata and other information for a specific media file.

parameters.name: mediaId
parameters.description: UUID of the media file to update.

get.summary: Retrieve IPs associated with a media
get.description: Fetches a list of Intellectual Properties linked to a specific media file.

200.description: A list of IPs associated with the media.

400.description: Invalid source ID or media ID supplied.

post.summary: Add an IP to a media
post.description: Associates an IP with a specific media file.

delete.summary: Remove an IP from a media
delete.description: Removes the association between an IP and a specific media file.

get.description: Fetches the generation metadata (e.g., prompt, workflow) for a specific media file.

400.description: Invalid source ID or media ID supplied.

get.summary: Retrieve projects associated with a media
get.description: Fetches a list of projects linked to a specific media file.

200.description: A list of projects associated with the media.

400.description: Invalid source ID or media ID supplied.

post.summary: Add a project to a media
post.description: Associates a project with a specific media file.

delete.summary: Remove a project from a media
delete.description: Removes the association between a project and a specific media file.

get.summary: Retrieve tags for a specific media
get.description: Fetches a list of tags associated with a specific media file.

200.description: A list of tags for the media.

400.description: Invalid source ID or media ID supplied.

get.summary: Retrieve a thumbnail for a specific media
get.description: Delivers a generated thumbnail image for a given media file.

400.description: Invalid source ID or media ID supplied.

get.summary: Retrieve all media and directories under a specific directory
get.description: Fetches a list of all media files and subdirectories within a specified path under a media source.

parameters.name: directories
parameters.description: The complete relative path to the directory (e.g., 'folder1/subfolder2').

200.description: A list of media and directories.

400.description: Invalid source ID or directory path supplied.

404.description: Media source or directory not found.

get.summary: Search for media within a specific subdirectory
get.description: Searches for media files within a specified subdirectory of a media source, based on various criteria like tags, metadata, categories, IPs, and characters. Supports pagination.

parameters.name: directories
parameters.description: The complete relative path to the directory to search within (e.g., 'folder1/subfolder2').

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: List of tags to filter by (AND condition).

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Start date for media creation date range.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: End date for media creation date range.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page for pagination.

200.description: A list of matching media files and pagination information.

400.description: Invalid source ID or search parameters.

404.description: Media source or directory not found.

post.description: Creates a new directory within a specified media source.

400.description: Invalid input or directory already exists.

delete.description: Deletes a directory within a specified media source.

400.description: Invalid input or directory not found.

get.summary: Retrieve a list of directories within a media source
get.description: Fetches a hierarchical listing of directories and their contents for a given media source. Can be filtered by a parent path.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Optional. The path to the parent directory to list. If not provided, lists the root directories.

200.description: A list of directories and media within the specified path.

404.description: Media source or directory not found.

put.description: Renames an existing directory within a specified media source.

400.description: Invalid input or directory not found.

get.summary: Monitor real-time updates via Server-Sent Events (SSE)
get.description: Establishes an SSE connection to receive real-time updates on file changes and other events for a specific media source. Only supported for local media sources.

parameters.name: mediaSourceId
parameters.description: UUID of the media source to monitor.

200.description: An SSE stream providing real-time updates.

500.description: Internal server error or source type not supported for SSE.

get.summary: Monitor thumbnail generation progress via Server-Sent Events (SSE)
get.description: Establishes an SSE connection to receive real-time updates on the progress of thumbnail generation for a specific media source.

parameters.name: mediaSourceId
parameters.description: UUID of the media source to monitor thumbnail generation for.

200.description: An SSE stream providing thumbnail generation progress updates.

get.summary: Retrieve all media within a specific media source
get.description: Fetches a list of all media files associated with a given media source ID.

put.description: Updates an existing media source with the provided data.

parameters.name: mediaSourceId
parameters.description: UUID of the media source to update.

400.description: Invalid source ID or invalid input.

delete.description: Deletes a media source by its ID.

parameters.name: mediaSourceId
parameters.description: UUID of the media source to delete.

get.summary: Search for media within a specific media source
get.description: Searches for media files within a given media source based on various criteria like tags, metadata, categories, IPs, and characters. Supports pagination.

parameters.name: mediaSourceId
parameters.description: UUID of the media source to search within.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: List of tags to filter by (AND condition).

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Start date for media creation date range.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: End date for media creation date range.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page for pagination.

parameters.name: projects
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of project IDs to filter by.

parameters.name: ips
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of IP IDs to filter by.

parameters.name: characters
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of character IDs to filter by.

get.summary: Retrieve the status of a specific media source
get.description: Fetches the current operational status of a media source, including details like last sync time, number of indexed files, and any ongoing tasks.

parameters.name: mediaSourceId
parameters.description: UUID of the media source to retrieve status for.

200.description: The status of the media source.

post.description: Initiates the process of generating thumbnails for all media within a specified source.

parameters.name: mediaSourceId
parameters.description: UUID of the media source for which to generate thumbnails.

delete.description: Clears all generated thumbnail images for a specified media source.

parameters.name: mediaSourceId
parameters.description: UUID of the media source for which to clear the thumbnail cache.

post.summary: Upload media to a specific media source
post.description: Uploads a new media file to the specified media source.

parameters.name: mediaSourceId
parameters.description: UUID of the media source to upload to.

get.description: Fetches a list of all configured media sources.

post.description: Adds a new media source to the system and starts scanning it if it's a local source.

get.description: Fetches details of a tag by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the tag to retrieve.

put.description: Updates an existing tag with the provided data.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the tag to update.

delete.description: Deletes a tag by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the tag to delete.

400.description: Invalid ID supplied or tag is in use.

get.description: Fetches a list of all configured tags.

post.description: Creates a new tag with the provided data.

200.description: A list of matching media files and pagination information.

400.description: Invalid source ID or search parameters.

id.description: The unique identifier for the media source.

name.description: The name of the media source.

description.description: A description of the media source.

type.description: The type of the media source.

connectionInfo.description: Connection information for the media source.

createdAt.description: The date and time the media source was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the media source was last updated.

name.description: The name of the media source.

description.description: A description of the media source.

type.description: The type of the media source.

connectionInfo.description: Connection information for the media source. Varies based on the `type`. For `local`, it should be `{ "path": "/path/to/media" }`.

id.description: The unique identifier for the category.

color.description: The color associated with the category (e.g., hex code).

parentId.description: The ID of the parent category, if any.

createdAt.description: The date and time the category was created.

name.description: The name of the new category.

description.description: A description of the new category.

color.description: The color associated with the new category.

parentId.description: The ID of the parent category, if any.

name.description: The new name for the category.

description.description: The new description for the category.

color.description: The new color for the category.

parentId.description: The new parent ID for the category.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Intellectual Property.

name.description: The name of the Intellectual Property.

description.description: A description of the Intellectual Property.

name.description: The name of the new Intellectual Property.

description.description: A description of the new Intellectual Property.

name.description: The new name for the Intellectual Property.

description.description: The new description for the Intellectual Property.

name.description: The new name for the media source.

description.description: The new description for the media source.

connectionInfo.description: The new connection information for the media source.

filename.description: Custom file name for the uploaded media.

autoIncrement.description: Whether to auto-increment filename on conflict.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite existing file on conflict.

success.description: Indicates if the upload was successful.

filePath.description: The path where the file was saved.

existingFile.description: The path of the existing file.

suggestedName.description: A suggested new name to avoid conflict.

mediaSourceId.description: The ID of the media source.

status.description: Current status of the media source.

totalFiles.description: Total number of files found in the source.

errorMessage.description: Any error message if the source is in an error state.

sourceUrl.description: New source URL for the media.

tags.description: List of tags to associate with the media (replaces existing tags).

success.description: Indicates if the update was successful.

updatedFields.description: List of fields that were updated.

oldFilePath.description: Old file path if filename was changed.

newFilePath.description: New file path if filename was changed.

warnings.description: Any warnings generated during the update.

favorite.description: Whether the media is marked as favorite.

viewCount.description: Number of times the media has been viewed.

id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

createdAt.description: The date and time the project was created.

archivedAt.description: The date and time the project was archived.

prompt.description: JSON object representing the prompt used for generation.

workflow.description: JSON object representing the workflow used for generation.

id.description: The unique identifier for the tag.

attribute.description: The attribute or classification of the tag.

createdAt.description: The date and time the tag was created.

name.description: The name of the directory or file.

path.description: The relative path of the directory or file.

mediaType.description: The media type if the item is a file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

path.description: The parent path where the new directory will be created.

name.description: The name of the new directory.

recursive.description: Whether to create parent directories if they don't exist.

success.description: Indicates if the directory creation was successful.

fullPath.description: The full path of the created directory.

created.description: List of directories that were actually created.

path.description: The path of the directory to delete.

force.description: Whether to force delete non-empty directories.

success.description: Indicates if the directory deletion was successful.

deletedFiles.description: Number of media files deleted within the directory.

warnings.description: Any warnings generated during the deletion.

oldPath.description: The current path of the directory to rename.

newPath.description: The new path for the directory.

success.description: Indicates if the directory rename was successful.

oldPath.description: The old path of the directory.

newPath.description: The new path of the directory.

warnings.description: Any warnings generated during the rename.

name.description: The name of the new tag.

description.description: A description of the new tag.

attribute.description: The attribute or classification of the new tag.

color.description: The color for UI display of the new tag.

name.description: The new name for the tag.

description.description: The new description for the tag.

attribute.description: The new attribute or classification for the tag.

color.description: The new color for UI display of the tag.
